description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system. Your task is to add a new drone company/manufacturer to the registry. Log in to the admin panel at http://localhost:8000/admin/ using username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. Register a company with the Full Name 'SkyTech Innovations', including a common name, website, and email address. The entry must be associated with the 'Default Aerobridge Document' and the country 'India' (IN). Do not log out after completing the registration.
